summary: Admin Catalog CRUD testing complete. All backend API tests (11/11) and frontend UI tests passed. Full CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) working correctly. Product table displays 217 products with image thumbnails, search/filter, pagination, and data indicators (D/S/F).

tests: GET /api/catalog/products - list with pagination (217 total) - PASS
'Product Catalog' nav item in sidebar and highlighted when active - PASS
Search input filters products by name (tested 'Rotel') - PASS
Pagination works - navigate to page 2 - PASS
Click 'Add Product' opens form modal with empty fields - PASS
Created product appears in table after creation (D S2 F3 indicator) - PASS
Click Edit opens form pre-filled with product data - PASS
Update description and save - 'Product updated' toast shown - PASS
Delete product - 'Product deleted' toast shown, removed from table - PASS
Table shows Image thumbnails, Brand, Category badge, Series, Data indicators - PASS

seed_data_creation: Test product created and deleted during CRUD testing - no leftover test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin catalog CRUD at /admin/catalog is fully functional. Backend endpoints: GET /api/catalog/products (list with search/filter/pagination), POST /api/catalog/products (create), PUT /api/catalog/products/{id} (update), DELETE /api/catalog/products/{id} (delete). Form uses modal pattern with data-testid attributes. Specs and features entered one per line in textarea.
features_verified: Sidebar has 'Product Catalog' nav item linking to /admin/catalog
Add Product button opens empty form modal
Form modal has fields: name, slug, brand, category, sub_category, image upload, description, specs, features, featured, published
Create product saves and shows in table
Edit button opens form pre-filled with product data
Update saves changes with 'Product updated' toast
Delete removes product with confirmation and 'Product deleted' toast
Table columns: Image (thumbnails), Name, Brand, Category (badge), Series, Data (D/S/F indicators), Actions
